basis: the current method should become a reusable template chain
later rounds should be able to restart from compressed method artifacts
template semantics should not crystallize demand assumptions too early

reasons: A reusable method chain is needed for later replay.
Variable mapping and handoff rules must survive beyond the current round.
Latent demand, visibility barriers, and open assumptions are still active.
Template compression would become too rigid if discovery uncertainty were ignored.

template_mode.why: template compression depends on already-stabilized method outputs

discovery_and_hypothesis_mode.why: latent demand discovery and open-hypothesis governance begin before template crystallization

probe_activations.trigger_reason: template compression would have hardened unstable demand assumptions without a bounded discovery pass
probe_activations.deepen_when: if latent demand and reversible assumptions continue to reshape reusable template defaults

mode_precedence.precedence_basis: open demand uncertainty should constrain template crystallization timing
mode_precedence.note: Template mode may compress method structure, but should not freeze demand assumptions too early.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Expose which demand elements are still latent or field-created before template compression hardens the method.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Template compression may wrongly treat unstable demand framing as already final.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Expose which assumptions must remain reversible in the template chain.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Template chain may promote unstable assumptions into reusable defaults.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Record which paths were compressed away so discovery can later reopen them if new evidence appears.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Discovery loses visibility into what was compressed or excluded during template formation.

interaction_notes.active_when: the round wants reusable method compression before demand visibility has fully crystallized
interaction_notes.note: Keep method compression and demand certainty separate; do not let template defaults silently harden latent-demand assumptions.

profile_adjustment_recommendation.adjustment_reason: autonomous deep expansion was appropriate because discovery had to remain active long enough to protect template compression from premature closure
